fields.helpText: From Twilio Console -> Account -> Account SID

fields.label: Auth Token
fields.helpText: From Twilio Console -> Account -> Auth Token

healthcheck_config.description: Validates credentials via Twilio account endpoint

metadata.summary: Twilio SMS, voice, WhatsApp, and communication APIs.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Log in to the Twilio Console at console.twilio.com
2. Your Account SID (AC...) and Auth Token are on the dashboard
3. Click the eye icon to reveal the Auth Token
4. Copy both values and paste them here
